title: lass leucantha
intro: Lass leucantha, also known as Mexican Sage, is a flowering plant in the mint family, native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its high content of antioxidants and essential oils. Herbal preparations of Lass leucantha can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function.
